prompt: What is the average grade given by each professor?

inputData.question: What is the average grade given by each professor?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average grade given by each professor?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average grade given by each professor?"},"startedAt":1771855543737,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average grade given by each professor. I've confirmed the schema structure: professors table contains professor names, course_sections links professors to courses, enrollments links students to course sections, and grades contains exam_score. The query joins these tables and calculates the average exam_score grouped by professor, ordered alphabetically by professor name for deterministic output.","sql":"SELECT 
  CONCAT(p.first_name, ' ', p.last_name) AS professor_name,
  AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)) AS average_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY professor_name","assumptions":["Grades are measured by exam_score column in the grades table","Average grade is calculated across all students enrolled in courses taught by each professor","Only non-null exam scores are included in the average","Professor name is the concatenation of first_name and last_name"]},"endedAt":1771855570128},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

visualization.title: Average Grade Given by Each Professor

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  CONCAT(p.first_name, ' ', p.last_name) AS professor_name,
  AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)) AS average_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY professor_name

visualization.title: Average Grade Given by Each Professor

result.sql:
SELECT 
  CONCAT(p.first_name, ' ', p.last_name) AS professor_name,
  AVG(CAST(g.exam_score AS NUMERIC)) AS average_grade
FROM professors p
JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
JOIN grades g ON e.id = g.enrollment_id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY professor_name
